title: Budget Visualization Using Graphs

posts.author: rfl93 (R)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

I’m on the newer side of Monday and I’m interested in visualizing my teams budget/time spent working on tasks in the graph view.

I’d like a way to break down the data by project and by person, and I’m curious whether this is possible/how other folks do this.

Ideally I would love a breakdown that looks like this:

image1334×193 26 KB

so that we have a breakdown visually of each individual and how much time they’ve spent on a project vs. the total amount of time we have budgeted for them to work on the project, so we can quicky see if they’re over the time budgeted, under, or on track etc.

Is that possible within Monday? Any add ons or tools that might be useful?

Thanks!
